cards.title: Grid Congestion Emergency
cards.description: Rapid renewable buildout without matching transmission upgrades creates regional congestion. Industrial users face curtailment and must rely on backup generation.

cards.title: Methane Leak Scandal
cards.description: A provincial methane leak scandal triggers intense monitoring and immediate compliance pressure on heavy industry.

cards.title: Imported Technology Failure
cards.description: A promising imported control system underperforms in local operating conditions, forcing costly rework.

cards.title: Severe Heatwave
cards.description: Extreme temperatures raise electricity demand and reduce equipment efficiency across the province.

cards.title: Insurance Premium Spike
cards.description: Climate-linked industrial insurance premiums jump sharply after a bad storm season.

cards.title: Battery Storage Breakthrough
cards.description: Cheaper grid-scale storage makes flexible low-carbon power procurement much more attractive for industry.

cards.title: Provincial Green Skills Program
cards.description: A labor transition program improves local expertise for industrial retrofit deployment.

cards.title: Low-Carbon Cement Additives
cards.description: New supplementary cementitious materials reach commercial scale, allowing deeper clinker substitution.

cards.title: Demand Response Revenue
cards.description: Industrial demand response participation generates new revenue while lowering peak emissions.

cards.title: Industrial Symbiosis Park
cards.description: A new industrial symbiosis park lets facilities trade waste heat and residual materials more efficiently.

cards.title: Climate Accountability Law
cards.description: A new climate accountability law increases pressure on lagging emitters but improves long-term policy certainty.

cards.title: Industrial Decarbonization Tax Credit
cards.description: A temporary tax credit lowers the effective cost of qualifying retrofits.

cards.title: Export Standards Tighten
cards.description: Major buyers require stronger climate disclosures, increasing competitive pressure on exporters.

cards.title: Just Transition Package
cards.description: A just transition package softens industrial resistance to cap tightening by subsidizing worker reskilling.

cards.title: Managed Cap Relief
cards.description: After industry pushback, regulators offer limited short-term cap relief next year while keeping the long-term trajectory intact.

cards.title: Voluntary Market Convergence
cards.description: Voluntary buyers converge on higher-quality industrial credits, supporting a healthier offset market.

cards.title: Hydrogen Hype Cycle
cards.description: Capital floods into low-carbon hydrogen suppliers, improving industrial access to new decarbonization options.

cards.title: Registry Modernization
cards.description: Modern registry tools reduce transaction frictions and improve confidence in compliance-market operations.

cards.title: Steel Scrap Windfall
cards.description: Unexpected regional scrap availability improves material efficiency options for steel producers.

cards.title: Cheap Solar Procurement Window
cards.description: An oversupplied renewable market briefly makes long-term industrial solar procurement extremely attractive.
